title: StoryPlanComment
description: Schema for the story-plan structured comment emitted by post-story-plan.js. One comment per Story; idempotent upserts increment plan_revision on each re-post. See Tech Spec #3250 for the full data-model narrative.

files_to_touch.description: Paths the agent expects to create or modify. Normally a subset or close superset of the Story changes[].path set.

ac_mapping.description: Keyed by acceptance-criteria index (0-based, as a string). Maps each AC item to the test files and optional notes planned to satisfy it.

tests.description: Test file paths or test identifiers planned to cover this AC item.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about how this AC item will be satisfied.

open_questions.description: Open questions the agent surfaces before committing. A non-empty list triggers an operator-visible finding.

plan_revision.description: Monotonically increasing counter. Starts at 1; incremented each time the plan is re-posted (e.g. after a re-plan following a validation failure).
